creative_direction: Dark luxury, electric blue and bronze; Meta advertising systems, data, AI, premium B2B/home-service growth; sophisticated not gimmicky.
important_notes: People shown are AI-generated fictional/composite individuals, not real clients, youth, employees, advisors, or named principals.
Assets are stored in a non-deploy creative-assets folder for editorial review and future implementation.
Prompts intentionally avoid logos, readable text, official seals, named companies, or claims that would require consent.

assets.title: Compounding funnel hero
assets.description: Abstract dark-luxury particles resolving into a structured glowing funnel, matching the site’s hero concept.
assets.intended_use: Homepage static/mobile hero fallback or OpenGraph hero candidate.
assets.alt: Glowing blue particles form a structured marketing funnel on a dark background.
assets.prompt: Premium dark luxury 3D editorial image for Post2Profits: chaotic electric-blue particles resolving into a structured glowing marketing funnel, subtle bronze highlights, deep charcoal background, cinematic depth, high-ticket Meta advertising system visual, sophisticated not cheesy, no logos, no readable text, 16:9 website hero

assets.title: Operator dashboard command desk
assets.description: A premium operator/founder figure at a glass desk with glowing acquisition dashboards, no real brand marks.
assets.intended_use: About/system hero for authority and premium partnership.
assets.alt: A marketer works at a dark desk surrounded by glowing dashboards.
assets.prompt: Premium real-life editorial photograph with cinematic dark luxury lighting: high-ticket marketing operator at glass desk reviewing glowing campaign dashboards on monitors, electric blue and bronze accents, face not identifiable, sharp suit-casual styling, no platform logos, no readable text, sophisticated $100K agency website feel

assets.title: Home service lead-flow visualization
assets.description: A home-service truck and homeowner context with subtle blue data-flow overlay, no logos.
assets.intended_use: Home Services tab visual or case-study hero.
assets.alt: A home service truck scene with subtle glowing lead-flow graphics.
assets.prompt: Premium cinematic marketing image: anonymous home service truck outside an upscale suburban home at dusk, subtle electric-blue lead-flow lines and conversion nodes overlaid tastefully, bronze highlight, deep charcoal grade, no company logos, no readable text, shows owning customer acquisition instead of lead aggregators

assets.title: B2B pipeline war room
assets.description: B2B team reviewing pipeline strategy in a premium dark room with abstract dashboard visuals.
assets.intended_use: B2B/high-ticket segment visual and results page.
assets.alt: A B2B team reviews pipeline dashboards in a dark strategy room.
assets.prompt: Premium dark editorial photograph: B2B leadership team in a glass strategy room reviewing abstract pipeline dashboards, electric blue data light, bronze edge accents, serious high-ticket service positioning, faces secondary, no logos, no readable text, sophisticated agency authority

assets.title: Creative engine studio
assets.description: A premium content studio setup with phones, lighting, storyboard cards, and campaign energy.
assets.intended_use: System Phase 2 visual for creative/content engine.
assets.alt: A dark content studio with phones, lights, and campaign storyboard cards.
assets.prompt: High-end dark luxury editorial image of a performance-marketing creative studio: phones on tripods, softbox lights, storyboard cards blurred, glowing blue campaign nodes floating subtly, bronze trim, organized creative engine, no logos, no readable text, premium Meta ads agency aesthetic

assets.title: AI targeting neural map
assets.description: A premium abstract neural targeting visualization with electric blue paths and dark luxury treatment.
assets.intended_use: System Phase 3 visual for AI-powered deployment and targeting.
assets.alt: An abstract neural targeting map glows in electric blue on a dark background.
assets.prompt: Premium abstract 3D data visualization: electric-blue neural targeting map converging into high-intent audience clusters, subtle bronze highlights, deep charcoal background, elegant AI-powered ad deployment visual, cinematic, no logos, no readable text, not sci-fi cliché

assets.title: Results analytics wall
assets.description: A dark luxury analytics wall visualizing compounding ROI and qualified-lead growth without readable fabricated numbers.
assets.alt: A dark analytics wall shows glowing upward performance charts.
assets.prompt: Premium dark luxury analytics-wall image for a high-ticket marketing agency: glowing upward performance charts, funnel stages, and lead-quality signals in electric blue with bronze accents, deep black glass, no readable numbers, no logos, crisp and expensive, 16:9 hero composition

assets.title: Selective partnership boardroom
assets.description: A private high-end boardroom scene suggesting application-only selectivity and serious partnership.
assets.intended_use: Apply page hero or final CTA visual.
assets.alt: A private dark boardroom prepared for a selective partnership meeting.
assets.prompt: Premium cinematic photograph of a private dark boardroom prepared for a selective marketing partnership meeting, glass table, one open laptop with abstract blue glow, bronze details, empty chairs, exclusivity and authority, no logos, no readable text, high-ticket B2B aesthetic

assets.title: Chaos into compounding funnel
assets.description: Abstract particles organize into a glowing funnel system, directly matching the homepage transformation concept.
assets.intended_use: Homepage video hero or mobile pre-rendered fallback.
assets.alt: Video of glowing particles organizing into a structured marketing funnel.
assets.prompt: Cinematic 8-second dark luxury abstract web hero video: chaotic electric-blue particles scatter across deep charcoal space, then smoothly organize into a structured glowing marketing funnel with subtle bronze highlights and data streams flowing downward into compounding growth rings. Premium high-ticket Meta advertising system, no logos, no readable text, smooth loop, silent.

assets.title: Campaign dashboard pan
assets.description: A polished dark-dashboard camera move across abstract campaign metrics and creative cards.
assets.intended_use: System/results video hero; communicates optimization and scale.
assets.alt: Video pans across a dark campaign dashboard with glowing charts and creative cards.
assets.prompt: Premium 8-second cinematic web hero video: slow lateral camera pan across a dark glass campaign command dashboard, abstract ad creative cards, glowing blue funnel paths, bronze highlights, performance charts rising without readable numbers, luxurious high-ticket marketing agency feel, no logos, no readable text, silent loop.
